message:
feat(FJ-P2C-007-D2): FFI call interface implementation

Added marshal.rs (Value ↔ FfiBuffer conversion with round-trip
fidelity for F64, I64, Bool scalars and tensors) and callback.rs
(pure and IO callback support with CallbackFlavor, FfiCallback,
CallbackRegistry). 39 tests total covering buffer, registry, call
dispatch, marshalling round-trips, callback invocation, and error
propagation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
